goal: 登记 Claude adapter C1/C2 thread ids

summary.title: Integrate Claude C1 C2 handoffs
summary.what: Copied the completed C1 evidence packet and C2 ingestion-route decision into the canonical Claude adapter workflow, updated the registry to integrated, and recorded that C1 supports C2's private hybrid route.
summary.why: The orchestrator must reconcile worker-local handoffs back into the canonical control plane before launching dependent C3 work.
summary.user_goal: 登记 Claude adapter C1/C2 thread ids

decisions.chose: Treat C1 and C2 as consistent and integrated.
decisions.rationale: C1 recommends SDK/session API first with raw JSONL only as private fallback/evidence; C2 chooses a private hybrid adapter with the same public-direction constraint.

decisions.chose: Mark C3 ready and keep C4 planned.
decisions.rationale: C3 can now use C1 evidence and C2 route; C4 still depends on C3 filtering and linearization policy.

rejected.reason: C4 needs C3's concrete filtering and linearization policy before it can define a safe implementation slice.

review_notes: Actual commit files are C1-claude-evidence.md, C2-ingestion-route.md, session-registry.md, and workflow-state.md.
Mainline prepare shows the full branch diff from origin/main because this is a stacked workflow branch.
Validation: git diff --cached --check passed before commit.
Workers reported git diff --check passed and only their allowed handoff file was written.
No implementation, public-source promotion, release, global install, push, PR, merge, or production action was performed.

architectural_claims: Public Claude support should be SDK/session API first.
Raw Claude JSONL may be used only as private fallback/evidence unless later accepted.
A private hybrid adapter is the next route to design after filtering and linearization are settled.
security_implications: Integrated C1 evidence reinforces that raw Claude transcripts contain tool, attachment, thinking, sidechain, snapshot, hook/status, and private content-bearing structures that must not be indexed by default.
